name: ClickUp
mcp_notes: ClickUp provides an official, first-party MCP server to connect AI assistants with ClickUp.
one_liner: ClickUp is a project management and productivity platform that provides a REST API for programmatically managing tasks, workflows, and workspace data.

evidence.claim: The ClickUp API is a REST API that lets you interact with ClickUp programmatically.
ClickUp provides an official, first-party Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
The API documentation provides a complete reference for endpoints and payloads.

access_notes: Developers can register an app and generate API credentials directly within their personal and workspace settings in the ClickUp interface.
api_notes: The ClickUp API is a comprehensive REST API that allows programmatic interaction with tasks, projects, and other core ClickUp objects. Official documentation provides full reference details including endpoints and payloads.
auth_notes: Supports OAuth2 for app integrations and personal API tokens (Bearer tokens) for individual use.
